◎译　　名　完全和平手册 / Peace
◎片　　名　Peace ピース
◎年　　代　2011
◎产　　地　日本 / 美国 / 韩国
◎类　　别　剧情 / 纪录片 / 历史
◎语　　言　日语
◎上映日期　2011-07-16(日本)
◎IMDb评分  7.2/10 from 289 users
◎IMDb链接  https://www.imdb.com/title/tt1379207/

◎豆瓣链接　https://movie.douban.com/subject/5382765/
◎片　　长　75分钟
◎导　　演　想田和弘 Kazuhiro Soda

◎简　　介  

　　What is peace? What is coexistence? And what are the basis for them? PEACE is a visual-essay-like observational documentary, which contemplates these questions by observing the daily lives of people and cats in Okayama city, Japan, where life and death, acceptance and rejection are intermingled.
introduction: What is peace? What is coexistence? And what are the basis for them? PEACE is a visual-essay-like observational documentary, which contemplates these questions by observing the daily lives of people and cats in Okayama city, Japan, where life and death, acceptance and rejection are intermingled.
